instruction: Discuss the potential risks of public exploit availability.
input: A vulnerability was found in Inis up to 2.0.1. It has been rated as critical. This issue affects some unknown processing of the file app/api/controller/default/Proxy.php. The manipulation of the argument p_url leads to server-side request forgery. The attack may be initiated remotely. The exploit has been disclosed to the public and may be used. The associated identifier of this vulnerability is VDB-249875.
output: The public availability of the exploit increases the risk of widespread attacks, as it allows malicious actors to easily leverage the vulnerability for unauthorized access or data breaches. This magnifies the urgency for patch deployment in affected systems.
